nasb.text: After they had kindled a fire in the middle of the courtyard and had sat down together, Peter was sitting among them.

esv.text: And when they had kindled a fire in the middle of the courtyard and sat down together, Peter sat down among them.

cnv.text: 他們在院內生了火，一同坐著，彼得也坐在他們中間。

ccb.text: 他们在庭院当中生起了火，围坐取暖，彼得也坐在他们中间。

csbs.text: 他们在院子当中生了火，一起坐着。彼得也坐在他们中间。
